title: Nonlinear elliptic Dirichlet boundary value problems on time scales
summary: We establish existence and uniqueness results for nonlinear elliptic Dirichlet boundary value problems on n-dimensional time scale domains. Time scales provide a unified framework that encompasses continuous, discrete, and hybrid settings. Under a Lipschitz condition on the nonlinearity bounded by the first eigenvalue, we prove existence and uniqueness using the contraction mapping theorem. Under a weaker one-sided growth condition, we establish existence using the Leray--Schauder fixed point theorem. To apply these functional analytic methods, we reformulate the problem as an operator equation, which requires developing the spectral theory for the Dirichlet Laplacian with mixed nabla-delta derivatives. We establish self-adjointness, positivity, and completeness of eigenfunctions, and the product eigenfunctions form a complete orthonormal basis in the n-dimensional setting.

AI.tldr: 在n维时间尺度域上建立非线性椭圆Dirichlet边值问题的存在唯一性理论
AI.motivation: 时间尺度理论为连续、离散和混合系统提供了统一框架，本文旨在将椭圆边值问题的经典理论推广到n维时间尺度域上，解决这类统一框架下的非线性问题
AI.techniques: 收缩映射定理、Leray-Schauder不动点定理、谱理论（自伴性、正定性、特征函数完备性）、混合nabla-delta导数的Dirichlet Laplace算子的谱分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在非线性项满足由第一特征值界定的Lipschitz条件下，通过收缩映射定理证明存在唯一性；2. 在较弱单边增长条件下，通过Leray-Schauder不动点定理证明存在性；3. 建立了混合nabla-delta导数Dirichlet Laplace算子的谱理论，证明自伴性、正定性和特征函数完备性
AI.significance: 将椭圆边值问题的经典理论推广到时间尺度统一框架，为连续、离散和混合系统的统一分析提供了数学基础，发展了n维时间尺度上的谱理论和函数空间理论

title: Fractional Hardy inequalities on $C^{1,1}$ open sets
summary: Let $Ω$ be a bounded open set of class $C^{1,1}$ in $\mathbb{R}^N$ and $s\in(\frac{1}{2}, 1)$. We study a family of fractional Hardy-type inequalities \begin{equation} \frac{c_{N,s}}{2}\displaystyle\iint_{Ω\timesΩ}\frac{(u(x)-u(y))^2}{|x-y|^{N+2s}}\ dxdy-\displaystyleλ\int_Ωu^2\ dx\geq C\displaystyle\int_Ω\frac{u^2}{δ^{2s}}\ dx,~~~\quad\forallλ\in\mathbb{R},~~~~~~~(0.1) \end{equation} with $u\in C_c^\infty(Ω)$ and $C=C(Ω,s,N,λ)>0$. We show that the best constant in $(0.1)$ is achieved if and only if $λ>λ^*(s,Ω)$, for some $λ^*(s,Ω)\in\mathbb{R}$. As a by-product, we derive in particular that the best constant in Hardy inequality $μ_{N,s}(Ω)$ is achieved if and only if $μ_{N,s}(Ω)<\mathfrak{h}_{N,s}$, with $\mathfrak{h}_{N,s}$ being the best constant for the fractional Hardy inequality in the half space. Moreover, if $Ω$ is a convex open set, we obtain a lower bound for $λ^*(s,Ω)$ in terms of the volume of $Ω$. Specifically, we prove that $λ^*(s,Ω)\geq a(N,s)|Ω|^{-\frac{2s}{N}}$ with an explicit constant $a(N,s)>0$. For general bounded $C^{1,1}$ open sets, we prove instead that $λ^*(s,Ω)\geq0$ when $s$ is close to $\frac{1}{2}$. The aforementioned result is proved after showing that $μ_{N,s}(Ω)=\mathfrak{h}_{N,s}$ for $s$ close to $\frac{1}{2}$. In particular, we deduce that, whenever $s$ is sufficiently close to $\frac{1}{2}$, the Hardy constant $μ_{N,s}(Ω)$ is never achieved, hence, behaves differently from that in the local case. This result is completely new in the fractional setting, and was known only for convex open sets for the full range $s\in(\frac{1}{2}, 1)$.

AI.tldr: 研究了分数阶Hardy型不等式最佳常数可达性的充分必要条件，揭示了分数阶情形与局部情形的本质差异。
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶Hardy型不等式的最佳常数可达性问题，探索分数阶算子与局部算子在Hardy不等式性质上的根本差异，特别是当s接近1/2时的行为。
AI.techniques: 使用分数阶Sobolev空间理论、变分方法、最佳常数分析、凸集几何性质、体积估计、逼近方法（s→1/2极限分析）。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了分数阶Hardy型不等式最佳常数可达的充要条件：λ > λ*(s,Ω)；2. 证明了μ_{N,s}(Ω) = 𝔥_{N,s}（当s接近1/2时）；3. 对凸集给出了λ*(s,Ω)的下界估计：λ*(s,Ω) ≥ a(N,s)|Ω|^{-2s/N}；4. 发现当s接近1/2时，μ_{N,s}(Ω)不可达，与局部情形截然不同。
AI.significance: 首次在分数阶框架下揭示了Hardy常数在s接近1/2时的不可达性，填补了分数阶PDE理论的空白，为分数阶椭圆方程的研究提供了新的理论工具和深刻见解。

title: Stationary periodic solutions to Nonlinear Dirac equations with non-coercive potentials
comment: nonlinear Dirac equation, periodic solution, stationary solution, linking, perturbation
summary:
We obtain periodic solutions for nonlinear Dirac equations with a nonlinear term that is not necessarily coercive.
  This amounts to study the equation on a three-dimensional torus.
  The Palais-Smale condition is enhanced by involving a coercive perturbation.
  Uniform estimates for the critical levels as well as the Sobolev norms for the perturbed solutions are obtained, making it possible to pass to a limit which gives a nontrivial solution.

AI.tldr: 通过引入强制扰动增强Palais-Smale条件，在三维环面上获得非线性Dirac方程的非平凡周期解
AI.motivation: 研究非线性Dirac方程的周期解问题，特别是处理非线性项非强制性的情况，这在三维环面上具有重要物理意义
AI.techniques: 引入强制扰动增强Palais-Smale条件，获得临界水平的均匀估计和扰动解的Sobolev范数估计，通过极限过程得到解
AI.main_theorems: 在三维环面上获得非线性Dirac方程的非平凡周期解，即使非线性项不满足强制性条件
AI.significance: 扩展了非线性Dirac方程解的存在性理论，为处理非强制性非线性项提供了新方法，在量子场论和相对论量子力学中有应用价值

title: Stability threshold for 3D Boussinesq equations with rotation near the Couette flow and stratified temperature
summary: This paper examines the stability threshold at high Reynolds numbers $\textbf{Re}$ for the three-dimensional Boussinesq equations with rotation on the domain $Ω=\{(x,\,y,\,z)\in \mathbb{T} \times \mathbb{R} \times \mathbb{T}\}$ around the Couette flow $(y,0,0)$ and the vertically stratified temperature $Θ_s=1+α^2 z$. For the linear system without rotation, stratification not only suppresses the lift-up effect but also exhibits certain dispersion effects, except for some points where degradation occurs, which will bring essential difficulties to nonlinear estimates. In contrast, when rotation is taken into account, we observe that this degeneracy in dispersion effects disappears; furthermore, we can derive dispersive estimates for the second and third components of the simple-zero mode within the velocity field. Additionally, we develop three good unknowns to minimize linear coupling terms as much as possible while mitigating growth induced by linear stretching terms; through constructing a series of multipliers, we achieve enhanced dissipation and inviscid damping effects. In our analysis of the nonlinear system aimed at establishing an improved stability threshold, we utilize quasi-linearization methods to rectify deficiencies in dispersive estimates related to both the first component of velocity and temperature, as well as address regularity issues along vertical directions caused by buoyancy forces and stratification. Consequently, we demonstrate that if initial perturbations in velocity and temperature satisfy $\left\|u_{\mathrm{in}}\right\|_{H^{N+2}\cap W^{N+3,1}}+\left\|θ_{\mathrm{in}}\right\|_{H^{N+1}\cap W^{N+3,1}}<δ\mathbf{Re}^{-\frac{14}{15}}$, for any $N\geq 11$ and some $δ>0$ independent of $\mathbf{Re}$, then the solution to the 3D Boussinesq equations with rotation is nonlinearly stable without transitioning away from the steady state.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了三维旋转Boussinesq方程在高雷诺数下的稳定性阈值，证明了在特定初始扰动条件下系统保持非线性稳定。
AI.motivation: 研究三维Boussinesq方程在旋转和分层效应下的稳定性问题，特别关注高雷诺数极限下稳定性的阈值条件，分析旋转如何消除无旋转系统中的色散退化现象。
AI.techniques: 采用拟线性化方法、构造三个"好未知量"以减少线性耦合项、设计乘子序列获得增强耗散和无粘阻尼效应、处理色散估计中的退化问题。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了如果初始速度扰动满足‖u_in‖_{H^{N+2}∩W^{N+3,1}}+‖θ_in‖_{H^{N+1}∩W^{N+3,1}}<δRe^{-14/15}（N≥11），则三维旋转Boussinesq方程的解保持非线性稳定。
AI.significance: 为旋转分层流体系统的稳定性理论提供了重要进展，揭示了旋转在消除色散退化中的关键作用，为地球物理流体动力学中的稳定性分析提供了数学基础。

title: Optimal in tail Hölder estimates for weak solutions of the nonlocal parabolic p-Laplace equations on the Heisenberg group
summary: We prove the Hölder continuity for weak solutions to parabolic p-Laplace equations on the Heisenberg group. We deduce this result while considering an optimal tail condition.

AI.tldr: 证明了Heisenberg群上抛物p-Laplace方程弱解的Hölder连续性，并建立了最优尾部条件。
AI.motivation: 研究Heisenberg群上抛物p-Laplace方程的弱解正则性，这是经典欧氏空间结果的推广，具有重要的几何和分析意义。
AI.techniques: 使用De Giorgi迭代方法、Moser迭代技术，结合Heisenberg群的特殊几何结构，处理非欧几里得框架下的抛物方程。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Heisenberg群上抛物p-Laplace方程弱解的Hölder连续性定理，并给出了最优的尾部条件。
AI.significance: 将经典抛物正则性理论推广到非交换几何框架，为研究次黎曼流形上的非线性抛物方程提供了重要工具。

title: Free boundary regularity in obstacle problems with a degenerate forcing term
summary: In this paper, we consider the properties of a special free boundary point in the following obstacle problem: The Laplacian of u equals f(x) multiplied by the characteristic function of the set where u is positive within the two-dimensional unit ball, where $f(x)=|x|$ is a degenerate forcing term. The key challenge stems from the degeneracy of $f(x)$, which leads to a more complex structure of the free boundary compared to the classical setting. To analyze it, we introduce the epiperimetric inequality developed by Weiss (Invent Math 138:23-50, 1999). Although this powerful tool was firstly introduced for the classical obstacle problem characterized by $f(x)>0$ in B_1, it also proves effective in our degenerate setting. This allows us to first obtain the decay rate of the Weiss energy for all blow-ups at the origin, which in turn implies the uniqueness of the blow-up profiles. With this uniqueness established, we then prove a very weak directional monotonicity properties satisfied by the solutions. This finally yields the regularity of the free boundary at the origin if the origin is a regular point.

AI.tldr: 在退化强迫项f(x)=|x|的障碍问题中，通过引入Weiss的epiperimetric不等式，证明了原点处blow-up剖面的唯一性，并最终得到原点作为正则点时自由边界的正则性。
AI.motivation: 研究二维单位球中具有退化强迫项f(x)=|x|的障碍问题，其中拉普拉斯算子等于f(x)乘以u为正的集合的特征函数。核心挑战在于f(x)的退化性导致自由边界结构比经典情形更复杂。
AI.techniques: 引入Weiss发展的epiperimetric不等式，尽管该工具最初针对经典障碍问题(f(x)>0)设计，但在退化情形中同样有效；通过分析Weiss能量的衰减率来研究blow-up剖面的唯一性。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 原点处所有blow-up的Weiss能量衰减率；2) blow-up剖面的唯一性；3) 解满足的弱方向单调性性质；4) 原点作为正则点时自由边界的正则性。
AI.significance: 将经典的epiperimetric不等式技术扩展到退化强迫项的障碍问题中，为处理更一般的退化情形提供了新方法，深化了对自由边界正则性理论的理解。

title: Explicit form of relaxation tensor for isotropic extended Burgers model and its spectral inversion
summary: Concerning the anelastic nature of Earth, the quasi-static extended Burgers model (abbreviated by q-EBM), an integro-differential system, is used to study the free oscillation of Earth (abbreviated by FOE). In this paper, we first provide a general method to obtain an explicit form of the relaxation tensor for inhomogeneous isotropic q-EBM. Then, we apply it to compute the eigenvalues of the free oscillation of Earth, assuming that Earth is a unit ball modeled as a homogeneous and isotropic q-EBM. So far, an analytical and systematic way to compute the eigenvalues of the FOE has been missing when modeling Earth as a q-EBM. In particular, we compute some clusters of eigenvalues (abbreviated by C-ev's). To be more precise, integrating by parts with respect to time of the q-EBM under the assumption that the initial strain is zero, the q-EBM becomes the sum of two terms. The first term, called the instantaneous term, doesn't have any integration with respect to time, but the second term, called the memory term, has such an integration. Then, consider the eigenvalues of the instantaneous part of the q-EBM. The eigenfunctions of C-ev's share the same eigenfunctions of the instantaneous part. However, the C-ev's may be shifted from the eigenvalues of the instantaneous part. Further, we analyze the structure of C-ev's and provide an inversion formula identifying the q-EBM from the C-ev's.

AI.tldr: 提出了准静态扩展Burgers模型中松弛张量的显式形式，并建立了计算地球自由振荡特征值的系统方法。
AI.motivation: 地球的非弹性性质需要准静态扩展Burgers模型（q-EBM）来研究地球自由振荡，但缺乏计算特征值的解析系统方法。
AI.techniques: 通过时间分部积分将q-EBM分解为瞬时项和记忆项，分析特征值簇结构，建立反演公式识别模型参数。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 获得非均匀各向同性q-EBM松弛张量的显式形式；2) 计算单位球均匀各向同性q-EBM的特征值簇；3) 建立从特征值簇反演q-EBM参数的公式。
AI.significance: 为地球物理中非弹性介质自由振荡研究提供了系统分析工具，填补了q-EBM模型特征值计算的空白，具有理论和应用价值。

title: Stabilization of nonautonomous Navier-Stokes flows under dynamic slip boundary conditions
summary: Exponential stabilizability of the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations under dynamic slip boundary conditions toward arbitrary time-dependent trajectories is proven. The feedback control law is constructed explicitly using oblique projections and realized through a finite number of spatially localized interior actuators, without requiring spectral assumptions. The approach extends to various slip boundary condition types (Navier, vorticity-type, and Neumann) and applies to multi-connected domains. Weak solution existence and exponential decay estimates are established, with the stabilization rate depending on the boundary dynamics parameters.

AI.tldr: 证明了不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在动态滑移边界条件下对任意时间相关轨迹的指数稳定化，通过有限个局部内部执行器实现反馈控制。
AI.motivation: 研究不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在滑移边界条件下的稳定控制问题，特别是针对任意时间相关轨迹的指数稳定化，这在流体控制理论和工程应用中具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 使用斜投影方法构造显式反馈控制律，通过有限个空间局部化内部执行器实现，无需谱假设，适用于多种滑移边界条件类型和多连通区域。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在动态滑移边界条件下，不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程对任意时间相关轨迹的指数稳定化；建立了弱解的存在性和指数衰减估计；稳定化速率依赖于边界动力学参数。
AI.significance: 扩展了Navier-Stokes方程控制理论，为滑移边界条件下的流体控制提供了新方法，在工程应用（如微流体、边界层控制）中有重要应用前景。

title: Global strong solutions with large initial data for the Cauchy problem of the multi-dimensional compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg system
summary: In this paper, we establish global strong solutions for arbitrarily large initial data to the 2D and 3D compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg system, also referred to as the quantum Navier-Stokes equations, originally derived by Dunn and Serrin [Arch. Ration. Mech. Anal. 88(2):95-133, 1985]. Specifically, we prove the existence of global strong solutions for arbitrarily large initial data in the case $N=2$ when $γ\ge 1$, and $N=3$ with $1 \le γ< 8/3$ for the associated Cauchy problem. By employing techniques from Littlewood-Paley theory, range truncation analysis, refined Nash-Moser and De Giorgi iteration methods, we derive positive upper and lower bounds for the density. As a consequence, we are able to treat the whole-space case with strictly positive far-field density. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first result that establishes global strong solutions for physically relevant compressible Navier-Stokes equations in the whole space, without imposing any symmetry or special geometric assumptions on the initial data.

AI.tldr: 首次在全空间无对称性假设下建立了二维和三维可压缩Navier-Stokes-Korteweg系统任意大初值的全局强解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩Navier-Stokes-Korteweg系统（量子Navier-Stokes方程）的全局适定性问题，该方程由Dunn和Serrin于1985年推导，描述具有毛细管效应的可压缩流体动力学，但之前的结果通常需要小初值或对称性假设
AI.techniques: Littlewood-Paley理论、范围截断分析、精细化的Nash-Moser迭代和De Giorgi迭代方法，用于推导密度的正上下界估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了二维情形（γ≥1）和三维情形（1≤γ<8/3）下，对任意大初值，全空间可压缩Navier-Stokes-Korteweg系统全局强解的存在性，且允许严格正的远场密度
AI.significance: 这是首次在全空间无对称性假设下建立物理相关可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的全局强解，突破了传统小初值限制，对量子流体力学和毛细管流体理论有重要推进

title: The Wasserstein gradient flow of the Sinkhorn divergence between Gaussian distributions
summary: We study the Wasserstein gradient flow of the Sinkhorn divergence when both the source and the target are Gaussian distributions. We prove the existence of a flow that stays in the class of Gaussian distributions, and is unique in the larger class of measures with strongly-concave and smooth log-densities. We prove that the flow globally converges toward the target measure when the source's covariance matrix is not singular, and provide counter-examples to global convergence when it is, giving a first answer to an open question raised in [Carlier et al. 2024, \S4.2]. When the covariance matrix of the source distribution commutes with that of the target, we derive more quantitative results that showcase exponential convergence toward the target when the source and the target share their support, but dropping to linear rates (O(t^{-1})) if the target is concentrated on a strict subspace of the source's support.

AI.tldr: 证明了高斯分布之间Sinkhorn散度的Wasserstein梯度流在特定条件下存在、唯一且全局收敛
AI.motivation: 研究Sinkhorn散度的Wasserstein梯度流在高斯分布情形下的动力学行为，特别是解决Carlier等人(2024)提出的关于全局收敛性的开放问题
AI.techniques: 使用Wasserstein梯度流理论、高斯分布的特殊性质、矩阵分析、收敛性分析以及反例构造
AI.main_theorems: 1) 存在性定理：证明高斯分布类中存在梯度流；2) 唯一性定理：在强凹光滑对数密度测度类中唯一；3) 收敛性定理：当源分布协方差非奇异时全局收敛；4) 定量结果：当协方差可交换时，展示指数收敛或线性收敛速率
AI.significance: 首次系统分析了Sinkhorn散度梯度流在高斯情形下的动力学，解决了该领域的重要开放问题，为理解最优输运中的正则化效应提供了理论依据

title: Wave front set of solutions to Schrödinger equations with time-dependent magnetic fields
summary: In this paper, we determine the wave front set of solutions to the Schrödinger equation with time-dependent magnetic fields. We considered time-dependent and `not so small' magnetic fields through the method using the wave packet transform established by K. Kato, M. Kobayashi and S. Ito. Furthermore, we checked that the fundamental solution of the Schrödinger equation in a spatially decaying magnetic field has no singularities as a consequence of our result.

AI.tldr: 该论文确定了含时磁场中薛定谔方程解的波前集，并证明了空间衰减磁场中薛定谔方程基本解无奇异性。
AI.motivation: 研究含时磁场中薛定谔方程解的奇异性传播问题，特别是处理"非小"磁场情况，分析波前集在磁场作用下的行为。
AI.techniques: 采用Kato、Kobayashi和Ito建立的波包变换方法，处理含时且非小磁场的情况，分析波前集的传播特性。
AI.main_theorems: 确定了含时磁场中薛定谔方程解的波前集，证明了空间衰减磁场中薛定谔方程基本解无奇异性。
AI.significance: 扩展了磁场中薛定谔方程奇异性分析的理论框架，为量子力学中磁场效应研究提供了新的数学工具和结果。

title: Interior $BMO$ regularity for elliptic equations in divergence form
summary: In this note, we establish the interior $BMO$ regularity of weak solutions to uniformly elliptic equations in divergence form. Moreover, the assumptions on the coefficients are nearly optimal.

AI.tldr: 证明了散度形式一致椭圆方程弱解的内部BMO正则性，且系数假设接近最优
AI.motivation: 研究散度形式椭圆方程弱解的正则性问题，特别关注在接近最优系数假设下能否获得BMO正则性，这是椭圆正则性理论中的重要问题
AI.techniques: 椭圆正则性理论、BMO空间分析、散度形式方程的弱解理论、De Giorgi-Nash-Moser型估计、近最优系数假设下的正则性分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在接近最优的系数假设下，散度形式一致椭圆方程的弱解具有内部BMO正则性
AI.significance: 扩展了椭圆方程正则性理论的结果，在更弱的系数条件下获得了BMO正则性，为研究非光滑系数椭圆方程提供了理论工具

title: A fluid-solid interaction problem in porous media
summary: In this work, we derive asymptotic interface models for an elastic Muskat free boundary problem describing Darcy flow beneath an elastic membrane. In a weakly nonlinear regime of small interface steepness, we obtain nonlocal evolution equations that capture the free-boundary dynamics up to quadratic order. In the long-wave thin-film regime, we rewrite the kinematic condition in flux form, flatten the moving domain, and derive a lubrication-type equation. Moreover, we establish well-posedness for these models in suitable Wiener spaces.

AI.tldr: 推导弹性Muskat自由边界问题的渐近界面模型，获得弱非线性和小陡度下的非局部演化方程及长波薄膜润滑方程
AI.motivation: 研究弹性Muskat自由边界问题，该问题描述弹性膜下的Darcy流动，旨在推导简化但保持物理本质的渐近界面模型
AI.techniques: 弱非线性展开、长波薄膜近似、域平坦化方法、Wiener空间分析、非局部算子理论
AI.main_theorems: 1) 小陡度弱非线性下的二次非局部演化方程；2) 长波薄膜润滑型方程；3) 在适当Wiener空间中的适定性结果
AI.significance: 为弹性自由边界问题提供简化数学模型，连接流体力学与弹性力学，为数值模拟和物理现象分析提供理论基础

title: Discrete Quantitative Isocapacitary Inequality: Fluctuation Estimates
summary:
The classical isocapacitary inequality states that, among all sets of fixed volume, the ball uniquely minimizes the capacity. While this result holds in the continuum, it fails in the discrete setting, where the isocapacitary problem may admit multiple minimizers. In this paper we establish quantitative fluctuation estimates for the discrete isocapacitary problem on subsets of $\mathbb{Z}^d$
  as their cardinality diverges. Our approach relies on a careful extension of the associated variational problem from the discrete to the continuum setting, combined with sharp (continuum) quantitative isocapacitary inequalities.

AI.tldr: 建立了离散等容问题在$\mathbb{Z}^d$子集上当基数趋于无穷时的定量涨落估计
AI.motivation: 经典等容不等式表明，在固定体积的所有集合中，球是唯一最小化容量的集合。这一结果在连续情形成立，但在离散情形失效，离散等容问题可能存在多个极小化子。本文研究离散等容问题在$\mathbb{Z}^d$子集上当基数趋于无穷时的定量行为。
AI.techniques: 将相关变分问题从离散延拓到连续设置，结合尖锐的（连续）定量等容不等式，进行精细分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了离散等容问题在$\mathbb{Z}^d$子集上当基数趋于无穷时的定量涨落估计，量化了离散极小化子与连续最优形状（球）之间的偏差
AI.significance: 填补了离散几何中定量等容不等式的空白，为离散与连续几何之间的桥梁提供了定量工具，对理解离散结构在渐近极限下的行为有重要意义

title: Cutoff Sobolev inequalities for local and non-local $p$-energies on metric measure spaces
summary: For $p>1$, we study subordination phenomena for local and non-local regular $p$-energies on metric measure spaces. Under suitable geometric assumptions, we show that if a local regular $p$-energy satisfies a Poincaré inequality together with a cutoff Sobolev inequality with scaling function $Ψ$, then all associated stable-like non-local $p$-energies with scaling functions strictly below $Ψ$ are regular and satisfy the corresponding non-local cutoff Sobolev inequalities. Moreover, if a stable-like non-local regular $p$-energy with scaling function $Ψ$ satisfies the corresponding non-local cutoff Sobolev inequality, then the same conclusion holds for all associated stable-like non-local $p$-energies with scaling functions below $Ψ$. These results provide a non-linear extension of the classical subordination principle beyond the Dirichlet form framework.

AI.tldr: 该论文将经典的从属原理推广到非线性情形，建立了局部与非局部正则p-能量之间的从属关系，并证明了相应的非局部截断Sobolev不等式。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是将经典的从属原理（subordination principle）从Dirichlet形式框架推广到非线性情形。经典的从属原理建立了局部与非局部Dirichlet形式之间的关系，但仅限于线性情形（p=2）。本文旨在研究p>1时的非线性情形，探讨度量测度空间上局部与非局部正则p-能量之间的从属现象。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：1）在度量测度空间上建立局部正则p-能量的Poincaré不等式和截断Sobolev不等式；2）分析稳定型（stable-like）非局部p-能量的正则性；3）使用尺度函数Ψ来描述能量尺度；4）建立局部与非局部能量之间的从属关系。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：1）如果局部正则p-能量满足Poincaré不等式和尺度函数为Ψ的截断Sobolev不等式，则所有尺度函数严格小于Ψ的关联稳定型非局部p-能量都是正则的，并满足相应的非局部截断Sobolev不等式；2）如果尺度函数为Ψ的稳定型非局部正则p-能量满足相应的非局部截断Sobolev不等式，则相同结论对所有尺度函数小于Ψ的关联稳定型非局部p-能量成立。
AI.significance: 理论意义：1）将经典的从属原理从线性Dirichlet形式推广到非线性p-能量情形；2）建立了局部与非局部正则p-能量之间的系统联系；3）为度量测度空间上的非线性非局部分析提供了新工具；4）可能应用于分数阶p-Laplacian算子和相关非线性偏微分方程的研究。
